name: HYDRA
description: 402-native paid work engine for agents and developers. Web extraction, search, format conversion, developer tools, web checks, public data, regulatory intelligence, prediction market signals, oracle data. 40 paid endpoints from $0.001 USDC via x402 on Base L2.

workflows.name: Web Extraction
workflows.description: Structured web extraction — title, headings, clean text, links, OpenGraph metadata from any URL.

workflows.name: Web Search
workflows.description: Web search with structured result extraction — titles, snippets, URLs.

workflows.name: HTML to Markdown
workflows.description: Convert HTML to clean Markdown. Preserves headings, lists, links, code blocks, tables.

workflows.name: URL Health Check
workflows.description: URL health check — status code, response time, redirect chain, content type.

workflows.name: DNS Lookup
workflows.description: DNS record lookup — A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME.

workflows.name: SSL Certificate Check
workflows.description: SSL certificate inspection — issuer, expiry, SANs, days remaining.

workflows.name: Hash Text
workflows.description: Hash text with SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, SHA-1, or SHA3-256.

workflows.name: Text Diff
workflows.description: Unified diff between two texts with change stats and similarity ratio.

workflows.name: Wikipedia Summary
workflows.description: Wikipedia article summary — extract, thumbnail, description, page URL.

workflows.name: arXiv Search
workflows.description: Search arXiv for academic papers — titles, authors, abstracts, PDF links.

workflows.name: SEC EDGAR Filings
workflows.description: Search SEC EDGAR for company filings — 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K.

workflows.name: Regulatory Risk Scan
workflows.description: Analyze a business against all applicable regulatory frameworks with scored impact assessment.

workflows.name: Prediction Market Signals
workflows.description: Bulk scored signals for all regulatory prediction markets.

workflows.name: Token Price Lookup
workflows.description: Current price, 24h change, market cap for any listed token.
